notes: Maps natural-language keywords to canonical APEX components, required rule files, templates, and required inputs. Used by the root APEXlang router while loading references/workflows/apex-generation.md to build structured Message 2 without inventing attributes or UT classes.

components.name: da-refresh-region-after-dialog
synonyms: after dialog close update the report
refresh the report after the dialog closes

components.name: da-refresh-region-on-change
synonyms: refresh the region when filters change
refresh this report when filters change
update the report as I change filters

components.name: da-enable-disable-items
synonyms: enable these inputs when condition met

components.name: da-focus-highlight-region
synonyms: add a glow to whichever item is active

components.name: da-set-value-plsql
synonyms: run some plsql to fill this

components.name: da-set-value-js
synonyms: mirror this value into another item

components.name: da-delete-with-notification
synonyms: click the trash can to delete
delete a row from the report

components.name: da-alert-confirm-cancel
synonyms: ask the user to confirm first

components.name: da-timer-refresh
synonyms: refresh the report on a timer

components.name: da-show-ai-assistant
requires: button identifier (optional; if trigger is click)

components.name: da-batch-apply
synonyms: apply this dynamic action to multiple pages
reuse this da on several pages
same dynamic action on every page
requires: shared parameters (e.g., condition value, server API)

components.name: da-execute-api-batch
synonyms: reuse this server action on many pages
add invoke api dynamic action across pages

components.name: translation
synonyms: configure my app to support a language
configure this app for another language
requires: target app or current app context
scope when user already states whole app or one page; otherwise ask
plain-language localization requests convert user-facing literals into shared text-message keys and substitution references
if the prompt also explicitly asks for a page control such as a button/menu/selector, clarify runtime language switching versus localization before routing

components.name: translation-batch
synonyms: add a language to the whole app
apply these translations to multiple languages
configure the whole app to support a language
make the whole app another language
push translated messages to multiple languages
translate this app to a language
requires: target app or current app context
scope resolved as whole app or one page
translation bundle only when user provides one explicitly
whole-app or page localization runs must rewire component text to substitutions instead of leaving direct translated literals
if the prompt also explicitly asks for a page control such as a button/menu/selector, clarify runtime language switching versus localization before routing

components.name: process-invoke-api-batch
synonyms: create invoke api process on multiple pages

components.name: server-side-condition-batch
synonyms: apply server side condition across components
set server side condition on multiple pages

components.name: button-actions-batch
requires: if the prompt requests a translation/language button, do not route to navigation/menu generation; clarify runtime language switching versus localization first

composition.rules: If multiple components appear in the one-liner, set target_type = page and union-load all referenced 20-data, 30-pages, and 40-components rules.

examples.input: page with an interactive report and a form on {{source.table}}; use Lookup LOV for {{lookup.valueColumn}}; refresh the report after the dialog closes
dashboard with cards summarizing record count by category
check entire app for all plsql code and see what can be packaged and consolidated
apply feature flag across save buttons
add inline help to form items

multiComponentCombos.input: translate this app into another language

app: target app or current app context
scope: whole app or one page; ask if unclear

multiComponentCombos.input: batch apply feature flag to save buttons
update help text for save button and form fields
remove only the cancel button from page 61 claim region

button-actions-batch: target or targets (page + region + button name)
